script_text: Authors use words for more than just their basic meaning.
Mythological references, allusions, and figurative language all show up.
An allusion is a quick reference to a story or myth everyone knows.
Calling someone a Hercules means they are super strong!
Words like soared, drowning, or melting often mean something figurative.
If a word seems too big or strange, look it up. Or use context to guess.
Now you are ready to unlock story word meanings!
